nasb.text: The servants of Absalom did to Amnon just as Absalom had commanded. Then all the king’s sons arose and each mounted his mule and fled.

esv.text: So the servants of Absalom did to Amnon as Absalom had commanded. Then all the king’s sons arose, and each mounted his mule and fled.

cnv.text: 押沙龍的僕人就照押沙龍所吩咐的，向暗嫩行了。王所有的兒子就起來，各人騎上自己的騾子逃跑了。

ccb.text: 押沙龙的仆人就照命令把暗嫩杀了。王的众子都起来骑上骡子逃走了。
